etymology.description: phonetic 戌 + semantic 火 (fire) -> extinguish
etymology.interpretation: The character 烕 (huǐ, "extinguish, destroy") combines the phonetic component 戌 (xū, "ninth month") with the semantic component 火 (huǒ, "fire"). The phonetic component contributes the sound, while the fire component indicates the meaning related to fire. The overall sense of extinguishing or destroying suggests the extinguishing of a fire.
